      13        30  │ │ │└TABLE SCAN keyword AS k WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%sequel%'
    9030     12960  │ │ TABLE SEEK movie_keyword AS mk
   12951     12951  │ TABLE SEEK title AS t WHERE t.production_year > 2005

queries.sql:
SELECT MIN(t.title) AS movie_title
FROM job.keyword AS k,
     job.movie_info AS mi,
     job.movie_keyword AS mk,
     job.title AS t
WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%sequel%'
  AND mi.info IN ('Sweden',
                  'Norway',
                  'Germany',
                  'Denmark',
                  'Swedish',
                  'Denish',
                  'Norwegian',
                  'German')
  AND t.production_year > 2005
  AND t.id = mi.movie_id
  AND t.id = mk.movie_id
  AND mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id
  AND k.id = mk.keyword_id;
